description.vi: Gói tối ưu miễn phí: gỡ bloatware, tác vụ nền, dịch vụ an toàn, nguồn, BCD, độ trễ mạng & multimedia.
description.en: Free bundle: remove bloat apps & tasks, tune safe services, power, BCD, network latency & multimedia scheduling.

deepDescription.vi: Gồm: AppX/Provisioned cleanup, Scheduled Tasks telemetry, dịch vụ nền (có danh sách bảo vệ), Startup Run, gói nguồn Ultimate/High, BCD disabledynamictick + useplatformtick, Win32PrioritySeparation & SystemProfile Games, TCP global (TcpAckFrequency), tắt Game DVR overhead, Widgets/Copilot taskbar, GPU scaling gợi ý. Có rollback qua VieXF (unapply).
deepDescription.en: Includes: AppX cleanup, telemetry tasks, protected-service tuning, startup cleanup, Ultimate/High power, BCD tweaks, scheduler/multimedia Games profile, TCP latency-friendly globals, Game DVR off, taskbar widgets, GPU scaling hints. Roll back via VieXF unapply.
